title: Review: relay round 19
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Two P0 correctness bugs (group cap overflow via deferred tx, SEALED_WHISPER user enumeration) need fixing before merge. The payment loss scenario (corrupt expires_at) is P0 but requires DB corruption to trigger. TYPING subscription bypass is a policy inconsistency. Core auth, crypto, and payment atomicity are solid.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) could not run cargo test to verify behavior; (2) SQLite transaction isolation semantics depend on pool configuration and connection reuse which I cannot verify without running code; (3) payment_watcher block-processing logic has implicit ordering dependencies with the scan-height persistence that are hard to verify statically. Would raise confidence with: full test run, SQLite WAL vs journal mode confirmation, and a test for add_group_member_capped concurrency.
